CVE-2020-7664.title: In all versions of the package github.com/unknwon/cae/zip, the Ex ...
CVE-2020-7664.summary: In all versions of the package github.com/unknwon/cae/zip, the ExtractTo function doesn't securely escape file paths in zip archives which include leading or non-leading "..". This allows an attacker to add or replace files system-wide.

CVE-2020-7668.summary: In all versions of the package github.com/unknwon/cae/tz, the ExtractTo function doesn't securely escape file paths in zip archives which include leading or non-leading "..". This allows an attacker to add or replace files system-wide.
